channel.title: Latest News on QCBS R Workshop Series
channel.description: Recent content in Latest News on QCBS R Workshop Series
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2023 [QCBS R Workshop Series](https://github.com/QCBSRworkshops/QCBSRworkshops.github.io). All Rights Reserved.

item.title: New coordination team for the QCBS R Workshop Series
item.description: We are excited to announce the members of the new coordination cohort for the QCBS R Workshop Series. Welcome! Antoine Caron-Guay (M.Sc. candidate, Université de Montréal) Clara Casabona i Amat (PhD candidate, Université de Sherbrooke) Paola Lisset Galloso Sanchez (candidate au doctorat, Université de Montréal) We look forward to seeing this fantastic team continue the QCBS R Workshop Series into the following terms!

item.title: Call for new R Workshop Series Coordination Team
item.description: We are opening a call for the recruitment of three coordinators for the QCBS R Workshop Series, to start their term this next September, 2022. Responsibilities The upcoming coordinators must ensure the organization and execution of the QCBS R Workshop Series and QCBS R Symposia.

item.title: Wrapping up the 2020-2021 Series
item.description: The QCBS R Workshop Series went through several major changes in 2020-2021: we implemented remote workshops for the first time ever, due to the impossibility of offering in-person workshops at universities during the COVID-19 pandemic, and welcomed a new coordination cohort!
